task_objective: Fix point-in-time restore not recorded by collapsing to manual_restore
design_decisions: Collapsed Backup Browser's point-in-time restore to use 'manual_restore' trigger instead of 'point_in_time_restore' which was dropping entries in history logic.
Added history integration test utilizing real HistoryManager to lock in correct 'last_operation' status updates.
results: All tests pass. Reviewer approved. Merged fix to dev and published dev release v0.3.0.
